item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic pasta bolognese, served with Parmesan and gremolata of parsley, lemon zest and finely chopped shallots. (1+6+10+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Pasta with lentil ragout in the style of bolognese, served with Parmesan and parsley gremolata with lemon zest and finely chopped shallots. (1+6+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chashu ramen: spicy noodles tossed with julienne vegetables, topped with pork chashu, fried egg and spring onion. Served with miso chilli ramen broth, pickled vegetables, homemade buldak sauce and blanched pak choy drizzled with chilli crisp and sesame. (1+2+7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: Dish King oyster mushroom ramen: spicy noodles tossed with julienne vegetables, topped with king oyster mushrooms, fried egg and spring onion. Served with miso chilli ramen broth, pickled vegetables, homemade buldak sauce and blanched pak choy drizzled with chilli crisp and sesame. (1+2+7+8+13+15)
